series: Ghost in the Shell: Stand Alone Complex
plex_title: Ghost in the Shell Stand Alone Complex
note: 2nd GIG — 26 episodes across 6 discs. Each DVD title = 1 episode (title 1 is always empty padding; episodes start at title 2). DVDs 1-2 are progressive; DVDs 3-6 are interlaced TFF.
